title: verbena rigida var. obovata
intro: Verbena rigida var. obovata, also known as Brazilian verbena, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Brazilian verbena include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. Brazilian verbena can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and improve mental health.
